services.title: Pool Installation
services.description: Above ground to inground transitions. Custom installations built to last.

services.title: Liner Replacement
services.description: Wrong size? We fix it. Perfect fit guaranteed on every liner install.

services.title: Pool Maintenance
services.description: Weekly cleaning and chemical balancing. Keep your water crystal clear.

services.title: Chemicals & Supplies
services.description: Well-stocked store with everything you need. No waiting, no special orders.

about.heading: Straight talk, honest pricing
about.body: We're the Spartanburg pool team that tells you what you actually need — no upselling, no surprises. When something goes wrong, we make it right.

reviews.name: Kyle
reviews.text: Ordered a replacement liner that came in wrong size. They said not to worry and resolved it completely — new liner installed in 4 weeks, no extra charge.

reviews.name: Lacy H.
reviews.text: Fantastic experience with this family-owned company. Responsive, honest, genuinely kind service. Best price around without cutting corners.

reviews.name: Paul A.
reviews.text: Scotty installed our pool in 2021 and maintains it since. Great service! Store always well-stocked with chemicals and supplies.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Upstate
service_areas.subheading: Pool service throughout Spartanburg County and beyond

cta.heading: Ready to dive in?
cta.body: Free quotes on installations, repairs, and maintenance. Call the team Spartanburg trusts with their pools.
